Bus Timings

Bus 120 Timings in Abu Dhabi Saadiyat Public Beach to Mazyad Mall

July 11, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Connecting the scenic Saadiyat Island to the bustling commercial hub of MBZ City, this route offers residents, commuters, and tourists a comfortable and affordable way to navigate the city. Whether you’re heading to the beach, a luxurious hotel, or a shopping center, Reg Bus 120 ensures seamless travel across key locations in Abu Dhabi.

Operational Details

Reg Bus 120 runs frequently throughout the day, offering convenient travel options for both early commuters and late-night travelers. Here’s the schedule for departures:

From Saadiyat Public Beach From Mazyad Mall
05:46 06:10
07:16 06:55
07:43 08:10
09:16 08:52
09:47 10:10
11:16 10:56
11:44 12:10
13:16 12:53
13:43 14:10
15:16 14:52
15:44 16:10
17:16 16:53
17:40 18:10
19:16 18:49
19:46 20:10
21:16 20:55
21:50 22:10
23:16 22:59

Download PDF Bus 120

Bus 120 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or simply follow this link to access the 120 Bus Timings.

  • Cash Ticket: AED 2.00, with an additional AED 0.05 per kilometer traveled.

  • Payment Options: Passengers can purchase or top up their Hafilat Smart Card, which is available at multiple outlets across the city. For more details on fare pricing, it’s best to refer to the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport’s official website.

Route Overview

The journey on Reg Bus 120 begins at Saadiyat Public Beach and concludes at MBZ City, Mazyad Mall. Along the way, it covers a diverse range of stops, giving passengers access to prominent hotels, cultural landmarks, and commercial centers.

Key stops along the route include: 1.

  1. Park Hyatt Hotel A luxury hotel that offers exquisite dining and spa experiences.

  2. Saadiyat Rotana Hotel Another premier destination for high-end accommodations and amenities.

4.

  1. Saadiyat Island Home to cultural landmarks, museums, and art galleries.

  2. Jacques Chirac Street A significant thoroughfare on Saadiyat Island.

  3. Hazaa Bin Zayed Mosque A peaceful mosque offering a spiritual retreat.

  4. Emirates Tower A notable commercial and office building.

  5. Fatimah Bint Mubarak Street A central street with access to various local businesses.

10.

  1. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A popular mosque, adding a sense of community along the route.

  2. Abu Dhabi Bus Station A major transit hub for travelers connecting to other routes.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street A central artery in Abu Dhabi, linking key commercial areas.

  2. Al Jazeera Sports Club A hotspot for sports enthusiasts, with various athletic facilities.

  3. Al Maqta Bus Interchange A key point for switching between different bus routes in the city.

  4. Capital Mall A modern shopping center featuring a variety of retail outlets and dining options.

  5. Mazyad Mall The final stop, a large commercial hub in MBZ City, offering shopping, dining, and entertainment.

Some other Abu Dhabi bus routes you can check out are the 101 bus route, which runs from Capital Park to Dalma Mall Main Entrance, and the 103 route, which goes from Mohamed Bin Zayed City, ADVETI to Capital Park.

Accessibility Features

Reg Bus 120 is equipped with accessibility features designed to ensure a smooth journey for everyone. The buses include ramps and designated seating areas for differently-abled passengers. Audio-visual aids are also available to assist those with hearing or vision impairments, ensuring that all passengers have a comfortable and inclusive travel experience.

Connectivity and Transfer Points

Reg Bus 120 integrates seamlessly with other bus routes at major stops such as Al Maqta Bus Interchange and Abu Dhabi Bus Station, making it easy for passengers to transfer to other buses or continue their journeys. These transfer points connect to other parts of Abu Dhabi and beyond, enhancing the overall convenience of the city’s public transportation network.

Nearby Attractions

Taking Reg Bus 120 offers more than just a commute; it gives you access to several of Abu Dhabi’s most popular destinations. Whether you’re heading to a luxury hotel on Saadiyat Island or enjoying the city’s shopping malls, this route covers it all:

  • Saadiyat Public Beach

  • Park Hyatt Hotel
  • Mazyad Mall
  • Gold Center
  • Al Jazeera Sports Club

Journey Experience

A trip on the 111 bus route from Saadiyat Public Beach to Mazyad Mall offers a diverse journey through some of Abu Dhabi’s most scenic and vibrant areas. Starting at Saadiyat Island, famous for its pristine beaches and cultural landmarks like the Louvre Abu Dhabi, the route provides passengers with beautiful coastal views before moving into the heart of the city.

The journey culminates at Mazyad Mall, a bustling commercial hub in Mohammed Bin Zayed City, known for its variety of shops, restaurants, and family-friendly attractions. This long journey gives a well-rounded glimpse of Abu Dhabi’s urban charm and natural beauty.

Travel Tips

For the best travel experience, consider traveling during off-peak hours to avoid busy buses, especially if you’re visiting popular spots like Mazyad Mall or Saadiyat Public Beach. Be sure to download the Abu Dhabi Department of Transport app for real-time updates on schedules and routes, which can be helpful for planning your journey. Additionally, keeping a portable phone charger handy ensures that you stay connected while on the go.

Reg Bus 120 offers an efficient and cost-effective way to explore Abu Dhabi, connecting the picturesque Saadiyat Island with the vibrant MBZ City. Whether you’re commuting to work, running errands, or heading out for leisure, this route covers key locations and ensures that passengers have a reliable and pleasant travel experience.

With its well-placed stops, frequent service, and affordable pricing, Reg Bus 120 is a great choice for navigating the city. Hop on board and discover Abu Dhabi with ease! For more travel options and detailed route information, be sure to check out the Full Abu Dhabi Bus Routes to plan your journey seamlessly.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 11, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
